rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.355 governs confidentiality of teacher and administrator performance evaluations. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.355. CONFIDENTIALITY. (a) A document evaluating the performance of a teacher or administrator is confidential and is not subject to disclosure under Chapter 552, Government Code.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and teacher evaluation confidentiality statute.
